ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF HANSON BRIDGETT LLP'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANTS LEVIN MENZIES & ASSOCIATES, LLC AND ICON LLC AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS HEARING SET FOR APR-27-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF HANSON BRIDGETT LLP'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANTS LEVIN MENZIES & ASSOCIATES, LLC AND ICON LLC AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN EXCEPT FOR PRIVILEGE. ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE SHALL BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY. FURTHER RESPONSES IN COMPLIANCE WITH C.C.P. SECTION 2031.230 SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,690, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar May-07-2010 Set For Trial On Nov-22-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-08-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613

Plaintiff Hanson Bridgett Llp'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendants Levin Menzies & Associates, Llc And Icon Llc And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
MICHAEL C. STARKEY, ESQ., (415)433-5333 EXT. 23, FOR Plaintiff/MOVING PARTY, Hanson Bridgett LLP
JAMES E. KROETCH, ESQ., (925)478-3346, FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY

HEARING WAS HAD. Tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Hanson Bridgett LLP'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendants Levin Menzies & Associates, LLC And Icon LLC And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Defendant's objections are overruled and ordered stricken except for privilege. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity. Further responses in compliance with C.C.P. Section 2031.230 shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,690, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (610/EAH)
